name: Swirl Solitaire Ring
description: A modern swirl diamond ring featuring a central solitaire and a layered spiral of stones.
stylistNotes: Ideal for cocktail parties or formal occasions.
materialCare: Clean with a microfiber cloth. Keep away from chemicals.

name: Cluster Sparkle Ring
description: An elegant gold ring embedded with clustered white stones for maximum brilliance.
stylistNotes: Perfect for bridesmaids or gifting occasions.
materialCare: Wipe gently. Store in a cushioned box.

name: Classic Cluster Diamond Ring
description: Timeless diamond cluster design with intricate work, ideal for engagement or wedding looks.
stylistNotes: Best suited for elaborate bridal lehengas or gowns.
materialCare: Wipe after use, avoid contact with harsh chemicals.

name: Princess Cut Statement Ring
description: Bold princess-cut diamond illusion setting ring with a sleek band for a regal look.
stylistNotes: Looks stunning with Indo-western or fusion bridal outfits.
materialCare: Do not spray perfume directly on the ring.

name: Golden Starburst Solitaire Ring
description: Elegant solitaire ring with starburst detailing in gold-tone finish.
stylistNotes: Wear with minimalistic lehengas for a refined look.
materialCare: Store in airtight container and avoid moisture.

name: Floral Diamond Leaf Ring Set
description: Elegant floral-inspired diamond ring set with delicate leaf accents, perfect for bridal occasions.
stylistNotes: Pair this with pastel or ivory lehengas for an ethereal bridal touch.
materialCare: Avoid contact with perfumes and store in a velvet-lined box.

name: Vintage Rose Gold Halo Ring
description: Rose gold ring with a radiant-cut centerpiece surrounded by dainty side stones in a vintage design.
stylistNotes: Complements traditional silk or velvet bridal wear beautifully.
materialCare: Clean gently with a soft cloth, keep away from water.
